name: Arms Regeneration
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>装</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>再</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>生</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
Activate 1 of the following effects.
● Target 1 face-up monster you control; it gains 800 ATK until the end of this turn.
● Target 1 Equip Spell in either GY; Set it to your field, or equip it to 1 appropriate monster you control.
You can only activate 1 "Arms Regeneration" per turn.

action: Sets from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
